author: Burgo
body: Glad it wasn’t just me Rachel ;)

author: Matt
body:
Something of a followup to Nothing Ever Happens….only not as good :-)

Different strokes, ya know?

I’m glad that song sits at the end of the album, because it grates on my ears – I can’t get into it..

I LOVED the What Is Love For album…and you’re right, you had no reason to worry about whether or not it was going to be good!

Check out some of the unreleased stuff that is on his Myspace page, if you haven’t heard it yet.

As Long As You Don’t Come Back is great…wish it was on the album.

author: Burgo
body: That’s what makes this gig so great Matt… a wealth of different opinions! Thanks, by the way, for your [post about Del Amitri rarities](http://addictedtovinyl.com/blog/2008/07/24/good-listening-del-amitri-rarities/); it’s what inspired me to finally get that Justin Currie album!

author: Makakman
body: Just had a listen to that Justin Currie track and love it, cheers Matt :) I thought the voice sounded familiar and now I know why.
